title: ListCount Property
description: Gets or sets the count of the number of items in a Listbox or Combobox.
notes:
To clear the items in  a ListBox or ComboBox, you can set ListCount to 0.  If ListCount is set to a value that is higher than the number of items in the list, then empty text is added for the extra items.

See Also: ListCount Property

List Property

GUI Items: ListCount Property

ComboBox, ListBox
examples:
' Retreive the number of items in a list
GGet frmMain.lstPartNames.ListCount, count

' Clear the items in a list
GGet frmMain.lstPartName.ListCount, 0
